Subject: Mon and Tues



 

Hi Jeffrey.  
Word is in...as of right now, I have 4 eggs that are fertilizing normally.  
Tomorrow is the implant.  We'll see what holds tomorrow, but I have a 
10:30am appt.  I will need to be out Mon and Tues just to sit around, but I 
will be in Wed for the half day. 

 

.////...I checked 
out surragates on line and there is no way that could be a part of this cycle 
...too much to do to make that happen now...but it does sound 
interesting.

 

 

I will be just 
laying around if you need me to make any calls or anything.

 

Les

 

 

 

 

 

 

Lesley Groff

Executive Assistant to Jeffrey 
Epstein
